subject: Re: Holiday pledge - Whitfield family
snippet: Matt, we did commit $200 - I'll get it in this week...
body:
Matt,

We did commit $200 for the Holiday Celebration during Coffee Hour Oct 25. I meant to run the card through the online form last week and got sidetracked with Thanksgiving. Let me know if you can send me the link one more time - I want to get it in before the Council meeting.

- James Whitfield

subject: Re: PayPal invoice for holiday pledge
snippet: Sorry Matt, I lost the link. Can you resend?
body:
Matt, sorry - the PayPal invoice link from Oct 20 got buried in my inbox. I still want to fulfill the $150. Would you mind resending? Also happy to just Venmo you if easier.

Rosa

subject: Holiday pledge $100
snippet: Stripe link timed out - trying again this weekend
body:
Hi Matt, the Stripe link you sent me last week timed out when I clicked it (says 'requires_payment_method'). I'll try again from a different browser this weekend. $100 pledge still stands.

Kevin Lam

subject: Check for holiday pledge
snippet: I promised $125 check - will drop it at church Sunday
body:
Matt, I know I promised the $125 check back in October. I completely forgot - I'll drop it in the offering plate this Sunday Nov 22, promise.

Beatriz Orozco

subject: Re: PayPal invoice - $75 holiday pledge
snippet: David: apologies, cash tight this month - can I pay after Dec 15?
body:
Matt,

Apologies for the delay. Money's tight until my Dec 15 paycheck - can I fulfill the $75 pledge after that? I don't want to bail on it but I can't do it before the Council meeting. Please still count me as committed.

David Morrison

subject: Holiday pledge $100 - I never received the Stripe link
snippet: I don't think the pledge link ever arrived...
body:
Hi Matt, I signed up for a $100 pledge at the Coffee Hour in October but I don't think I ever got the Stripe link. Could you check on your end? Happy to complete it as soon as I have the link.

Ana Figueroa

subject: Holiday Celebration - pledge tally update
snippet: Team: Great news! We hit $5,600 on holiday pledges...
body:
Team,

Great news - we hit $5,600 on holiday pledges as of this week. Between Stripe, PayPal, Square, and cash we're at the full projected revenue. This is a real win going into the Dec 8 Council meeting.

Matt - can you make sure the wellness booth budget line stays at $400? Rosa - let's confirm caterer figure at $2,800 like agreed in October.

Deacon Frank Herrera
Treasurer, Grace Community Church

subject: Re: Holiday Celebration catering - confirmed menu
snippet: Matt, final quote with expanded menu is $3,400. Please confirm.
body:
Matt & Rosa,

Based on the expanded menu we discussed (adding tamales bar, extending appetizer count from 4 to 6, and adding the coffee/hot chocolate station), the CONFIRMED catering total is $3,400 - up from the $2,800 committed in the original proposal. Please confirm so I can lock the shopping list.

Elena
Elena's Kitchen

subject: Re: Holiday altar arrangement
snippet: Adding altar centerpiece brings total to $475
body:
Hi Matt,

Thanks for adding the altar centerpiece to the order. Revised total: $475 (was $450). We'll deliver Dec 12 morning.

Graciela
Casa Flores

subject: Re: Delivery quote for Dec 12
snippet: $30 delivery surcharge added: total $380
body:
Matt,

Because the Dec 12 date is a Saturday holiday-season delivery, we need to add a $30 surcharge for the drop-off and pickup. New total is $380 (was $350). Please confirm ASAP.

El Paso Party Rentals

subject: Re: Audio setup Dec 12 - CONFIRMED
snippet: $175 as agreed. 4-hour block 4pm-8pm.
body:
Matt, confirming $175 for Dec 12 audio setup 4pm-8pm block as agreed. No changes.

Audio Express

subject: Re: Confirming Dec 12 performance
snippet: $600 for 6pm-8pm set. All good.
body:
Matt, we're locked in for Dec 12, 6pm-8pm, $600. Bringing full trio.

- Miguel, Los Hermanos Trio
